chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt:Petition.No.S-136 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01. For orders on M.A.No.290/2020(U/A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.291/2020 (E/A). 04. For hearing of main case. 18.05.2020. Mr. Bahadur Ali Shahani, Advocate for the petitioner. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner Khadim by way of instant constitutional petition has prayed for the following relief; (a) That, this Honourable Court may graciously be pleased to direct the official respondent No.1 to conduct the impartial enquiry into the matter of petitioner and deal the matter in accordance with law. (b) That, this Honourable Court may graciously be pleased to direct the official respondents No.2, 3 and 4 not to cause harass to the petitioner and his family meanwhile legal protection may be provided to them. (c) To award costs of the petition. (d) Any other equitable relief may be granted to the petitioner. It is case of the petitioner that the private respondent purchased from him a plot for rupees Twelve Lacs, paid him rupees Six Lacs but failed to pay the remaining amount, then asked him to sell out his plot to someone else, which was done accordingly, he now is harassing the petitioner and his family members through official respondents and in order to prevent such harassment, the petitioner by way of instant petition has prayed for the relief, as is detailed above. Heard learned counsel for the petitioner and perused the record. Admittedly, the parties are disputed over sale and purchase of the plot and such dispute involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction, under the allegation of harassment or enquiry.

Heard learned counsel for the petitioner and perused the record. Admittedly, the parties are disputed over sale and purchase of the plot and such dispute involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction, under the allegation of harassment or enquiry. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly together with listed applications. J U D G E
